about.title: About Martin Projekt Group
about.subtitle: Swiss craftsmanship since day one.
about.body: Martin Projekt Group is a Swiss construction and renovation company built on the foundations of quality, precision and reliability. With expertise spanning facade construction, interior finishing and full-scale renovations, we deliver projects that stand the test of time. Every detail is engineered with care - from the first sketch to the final finish.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We use only the finest materials and proven techniques.

precision.title: Precision
precision.description: Every millimetre matters. We engineer perfection.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: On time, on budget, every single project.

craftsmanship.title: Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.description: Decades of expertise in every surface we touch.

impressum.heading: Legal Notice
impressum.disclaimerText: The contents of this website have been created with the utmost care. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness or topicality of the content. Use of this website is at your own risk.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1p: Martin Projekt Group GmbH, -, Switzerland. Contact: info@martinprojektgroup.ch
privacy.s2p: Through our contact form we collect: full name, email address, phone number (optional), and project description. This data is used solely to process your inquiry.
privacy.s3p: Your data is used solely to respond to your inquiry and to establish a potential business relationship. We do not use your data for marketing purposes or share it with third parties without your consent.
privacy.s4p: For email delivery we use Resend Inc. (resend.com) as a data processor. This service receives the form data to forward it to us, based on a data processing agreement.
privacy.s5p: Your inquiry data will be deleted after full resolution of the matter and expiry of any applicable statutory retention periods.
privacy.s6p: Under the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (nDSG) you have the right to access, correction, deletion, restriction of processing, data portability, and objection. Contact: info@martinprojektgroup.ch
privacy.s7p: This website is hosted by Vercel Inc. (vercel.com). All data transmissions are encrypted via HTTPS/TLS.
privacy.s8p: For all data protection inquiries: info@martinprojektgroup.ch
